positive: A dynamic, stylized illustration of a group of diverse forest animals (fox, owl, badger, deer, squirrel) standing together in a circular, whimsical composition. They should be rendered with bold, clean silhouettes and thick linework, reminiscent of modern woodland folklore art. The style should be high-contrast graphic vector art with pops of muted jewel tones (forest green, deep indigo, burnt orange, moss yellow) against a creamy off-white background. Focus on positive space and crisp edges. Excellent for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetrical grouping. --ar 1:1 --style graphic vector --v 6.0
